scripts.typecheck:lambdas: npm run typecheck -w lambdas/posts -w lambdas/views -w lambdas/uploads -w lambdas/image-processor -w lambdas/metrics -w lambdas/publish-scheduler -w lambdas/newsletter-api -w lambdas/newsletter-campaign -w lambdas/newsletter-delivery -w lambdas/newsletter-feedback
scripts.build:all: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck:lambdas && npm run build:site && npm run build:admin && npm run build:infra
scripts.synth: npm run build:shared && npm run build:infra && npm run -w infra synth -- -c stage=homolog && npm run -w infra synth -- -c stage=production
scripts.check:fast: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck:lambdas && npm run build:infra && npm test
scripts.check: npm run build:all && npm test && npm audit --omit=dev && npm run synth
scripts.local:reset: docker compose -f local-stack/docker-compose.dev.yml down -v && docker compose -f local-stack/docker-compose.dev.yml run --rm --no-deps content-sync node local-stack/src/reset-content.mjs && docker compose -f local-stack/docker-compose.dev.yml down
